---
pagetitle: "Day 2 Schedule"
---

::: grid
::: {#sponsors_banner .g-col-12 .title}
# Day 2 Schedule
Tuesday| 13:00 - 16:45 WIB  
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .full_text_block}
::: {#morning_session .g-col-12}
## Regular Session 2 | 13:00 - 15:00 WIB | @Ruang Kuliah IVA
<div id="schedule-morning"></div>
:::

::: {#break_session .g-col-12}
## Guest Lecture 2 — 15:00 - 16:00 WIB | @Auditorium Biologi Tropika

| Time | Event | Title | Speakers |
|---|----|-----------|----------|
| 15.00 - 16.00 | Guest Lecture 2 | Large-Scale Biomanufacturing and Intelligent Synthetic Biology | Zhijie Yang |
: {.table .table-striped .table-hover .schedule-table}

:::

::: {#afternoon_session .g-col-12}
## Regular Session 3 | 16:00 - 16:45 WIB | @Auditorium Biologi Tropika
<div id="schedule-afternoon"></div>
:::

<script src="/js/schedule.js"></script>

<script>
const SCHEDULE_MORNING = {
  files: ["/assets/reguler-selasa-morning.json"]
};

const SCHEDULE_AFTERNOON = {
  files: ["/assets/reguler-selasa-afternoon.json"]
};

renderSchedule("schedule-morning", SCHEDULE_MORNING);
renderSchedule("schedule-afternoon", SCHEDULE_AFTERNOON);
</script>

:::
:::
